summary: Completed comprehensive security testing for Banking KE Security Audit Dashboard. All 20 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend tests passed (100%). Security headers, XSS sanitization, and HTTPS enforcement are properly implemented.

issues: CSP frame-ancestors directive ignored in meta tag (expected browser behavior, not a bug)

critical_code_review_comments: CORS_ORIGINS='*' in backend/.env is overly permissive for production - consider restricting to specific domains
CSP includes 'unsafe-inline' and 'unsafe-eval' for scripts - acceptable for React but could be tightened with nonces in production
seed_data_creation: Created test entries with TEST_ prefix via /api/status POST endpoint
context_for_next_testing_agent: All security features are working correctly. Backend tests cover: security headers (8 tests), security status endpoint (2 tests), XSS sanitization (4 tests), status CRUD (3 tests), root endpoint (1 test), CORS (2 tests). Frontend verified: dashboard loads, 4/4 score displayed, all 4 issue cards present with Fixed status, cards expandable, backend security configuration shows all green checks.

api_endpoints.POST /api/status: Creates new status check with XSS sanitization
api_endpoints.GET /api/security/status: Returns all security configurations as true
